fields.name: designation
fields.description: Sexagesimal, equatorial position-based source name

fields.name: ra
fields.description: J2000 right ascension with respect to the 2MASS PSC reference frame from the non-moving source extraction

fields.name: dec
fields.description: J2000 declination with respect to the 2MASS PSC reference frame from the non-moving source extraction

fields.name: sigra
fields.description: One-sigma uncertainty in right ascension from profile-fit photometry

fields.name: sigdec
fields.description: One-sigma uncertainty in declination from profile-fit photometry

fields.name: w1mpro
fields.description: W1 (3.4 um) magnitude measured with profile-fitting photometry, or the magnitude of the 95% confidence brightness upper limit if the flux measurement has SNR < 2

fields.name: w1sigmpro
fields.description: W1 profile-fit photometric measurement uncertainty; null if the W1 profile-fit magnitude is an upper limit

fields.name: w1snr
fields.description: W1 profile-fit measurement signal-to-noise ratio (flux to flux uncertainty)

fields.name: w2mpro
fields.description: W2 (4.6 um) profile-fit magnitude or 95% confidence upper limit

fields.name: w2sigmpro
fields.description: W2 profile-fit photometric measurement uncertainty; null if upper limit

fields.name: w3mpro
fields.description: W3 (12 um) profile-fit magnitude or 95% confidence upper limit

fields.name: w3sigmpro
fields.description: W3 profile-fit photometric measurement uncertainty; null if upper limit

fields.name: w4mpro
fields.description: W4 (22 um) profile-fit magnitude or 95% confidence upper limit

fields.name: w4sigmpro
fields.description: W4 profile-fit photometric measurement uncertainty; null if upper limit

fields.name: pmra
fields.description: Apparent motion in right ascension estimated for this source (includes parallax motion for nearby objects)

fields.name: pmdec
fields.description: Apparent motion in declination estimated for this source

fields.name: cc_flags
fields.description: Contamination and confusion flag, one character per band (W1/W2/W3/W4), indicating spurious detection of or contamination by image artifacts

fields.name: ext_flg
fields.description: Extended source flag indicating whether source morphology is consistent with the point spread function or associated with a 2MASS XSC source

fields.name: var_flg
fields.description: Variability probability flag, one character per band (0-9, n); higher values indicate higher probability of flux variability

fields.name: ph_qual
fields.description: Photometric quality flag, one character per band (A/B/C/U/X/Z) summarizing the SNR of the profile-fit measurement
